tests.name: PCA9685 Init Sequence (ALLCALL preserved)
tests.details: All 9 boards initialized correctly. ALLCALL preserved (bug #12 OK).

tests.name: ALLCALL Emergency Stop Broadcast
tests.details: Single ALLCALL broadcast correctly zeroes all 144 motors.

tests.name: Raw I2C Bypasses SMBus 32-byte Cap (Bug #11)
tests.details: All boards receive 65-byte raw I2C writes. SMBus 32-byte cap bypassed (bug #11 OK).

tests.name: Board Payload Format Validation
tests.details: PCA9685 payload format correct for both OFF and active states.

tests.name: Invalid Depth → Zero Intensity (Bug #13)
tests.details: Zero/invalid depth always maps to zero intensity. Bug #13 fix verified.

tests.name: Depth-to-Intensity Linear Mapping
tests.details: Linear inverse mapping verified at all boundary conditions.

tests.name: Fusion Overlap Min-Distance + Invalid Handling
tests.details: Fusion correctly applies min-distance in overlap. Invalid readings properly excluded.

tests.name: Fusion Region Assignment (Upper/Overlap/Lower)
tests.details: Region assignment correct: rows 0-3 upper, 4-7 overlap, 8-11 lower.

tests.name: 144 Motors → 9 Boards × 16 Channels Mapping
tests.details: All 144 motors uniquely mapped to 9 boards × 16 channels.

tests.name: Edge: All Sensors Saturated (Max Power)
tests.details: All 144 motors at max. Estimated power: 11.5W

tests.name: Edge: Single Pixel Obstacle
tests.details: Single obstacle: 1/144 motors active at intensity 3943.

tests.name: Edge: Rapid Scene Change (Doorway → Open)
tests.details: Rapid transition: 144→141 active motors, intensity sum 339214→43751. Pipeline adapts instantly.

tests.name: I2C Bus Contention / NACK Handling
tests.details: Bus contention test: 35/100 frames succeeded, 65/100 had NACK errors.

tests.name: Thermal Throttle Simulation
tests.details: Thermal throttle: 4095 → 3276 after 100 continuous max-power frames.

tests.name: Long-Duration Stress: 500 Frames
tests.details: 500-frame stress test passed. avg=0.25ms, max=6.59ms, 0 errors.
